title: Gestgo
subtitle: Food + discovery companion. Still a concept — no code yet.

blocks.label: Status
blocks.text: Pre-code. Needs a one-pager before anything else.

blocks.markdown:
## One-pager outline

- **Who** — foodies who want to remember what they tried, not just rate it
- **Why now** — every existing food app is either reviews (Yelp) or social (Beli); nothing for personal taste-memory
- **MVP** — capture: photo + two-tap mood; retrieval: 'show me the last 5 spicy dinners'
- **Differentiator** — taste-memory, not crowd-wisdom
- **Next** — ship the concept doc, then a Figma frame
